name: Stir Fried Island Chicken/Peanut Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the creamy peanut butter, fish sauce, and chicken stock. Blend well until smooth.
2. Add minced garlic and red curry paste to the blender. Blend again until fully incorporated.
3. Heat the peanut oil in a wok over high heat until very hot.
4. Add minced garlic and ginger to the wok. Stir fry for a few seconds.
5. Add the diced chicken to the wok. Cook until halfway done, then add chopped carrots and stir fry for one minute or two.
6. Continue adding the remaining vegetables (zucchini, yellow summer squash) in batches, stirring for one minute after each addition.
7. Stir fry for an additional minute with the bean sprouts.
8. Add the roasted peanuts and the peanut garlic sauce to the wok. Mix well.
9. If the sauce is too thick, add a little more chicken stock as needed.
10. Serve hot, garnished with fresh coriander (cilantro).
